commit.message:
Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

security: second-round hardening — 19 findings fixed

- Zod validation for admin product CRUD and profile updates
- Image URL domain allowlist in lib/image.ts
- Sanitize email subject lines and notification content
- Generic error messages across all dashboard and admin actions

- Explicit column select in getListingById (was SELECT *)

commit.message:
feat(deep-research): v7.0 — alle 5 Root Causes behoben, 144 Tests grün

RC4: Language-Detection (ASCII-Ratio) → US-Location (2840) für englische
Queries, 5 Query-Varianten statt 3 (_perform_initial_search).

RC2: Domain-aware Embedding-Threshold — Tech=0.72 (war 0.85), Science=0.75,
Default=0.82. _group_similar_facts nimmt jetzt query-Parameter.

RC1+RC3: _resolve_verification_mode — strict+Tech → moderate (Auto-Mode).
Corroborator jetzt für alle Fakten mit source_count ≥ 1 (war: nur verified).
Upgrade unverified → tentatively_verified wenn Corroborator-Konfidenz ≥ 0.5.

RC5: ArXiv-Threshold 6→5, topic-aware Fallback-Score (5+Überlapp), 25
Kandidaten (war 15), Datum-Sortierung.

M6 — Qualitäts-Gate: verified_count ≥ 3 → OK, sonst light-Mode Auto-Retry.
Pipeline refaktoriert in _run_research_pipeline(), version "7.0".

Neue Dateien:
- tools/deep_research/diagnostics.py (DrDiagnostics Singleton, 23 Felder)
- scripts/debug_deep_research.py (CLI Diagnose-Runner)
- verify_deepresearch_v7.py (63 automatische Checks, alle grün)
- 6× tests/test_dr_*.py (144 Tests gesamt, alle grün)

Lean CI-Specs: +6 Theoreme (14 gesamt) — dr_query_expansion,
dr_embedding_threshold_lower/upper, dr_verify_moderate,
dr_arxiv_score_lower/upper — alle via `by omega` verifiziert.

.env.example: DR_EMBEDDING_THRESHOLD_TECH=0.72, DR_VERIFICATION_MODE_AUTO=true
README: Phase 19 + Tabellen-Updates v6.0→v7.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: restore vertical scrolling on all pages

Root cause: body { overflow: hidden } was blocking all page scroll.

- globals.css: change body overflow: hidden -> overflow-x: hidden so
  vertical scroll is allowed by default; move overflow: hidden onto
  .app-shell so only the panel pages (/ and /dashboard) stay locked
- globals.css: mobile .app-shell override no longer needs to fight body
- review/page.tsx: outer div height:100vh + overflow:hidden ->
  minHeight:100svh + overflowX:hidden so content can scroll freely
- data/page.tsx: same fix as review page

fix: make category tabs background fully transparent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ssl): trust-all TrustManager in debug builds for emulator SSL fix

The network_security_config approach only works when system CAs include
the server's root CA. On emulators with outdated CA stores, even system
CAs can't validate the cert. This adds a trust-all X509TrustManager
guarded by BuildConfig.DEBUG, applied to both the Retrofit OkHttpClient
and the Socket.IO client (opts.callFactory + webSocketFactory).
Release builds are unaffected. Bump versionName to 1.0.39.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use trust_remote_code=True: qwen3_5_moe not in transformers 4.52.4

AutoConfig raises KeyError for 'qwen3_5_moe' because the architecture
was not backported to 4.52.4. Since upgrading transformers is not an
option, use trust_remote_code=True so the model loads its own
architecture code from the Hub cache. Removed all AutoConfig /
PretrainedConfig patching (no longer needed with remote code).

commit.message:
refactor: replace Repomix MCP with CLI-based approach

/pack now runs `repomix --compress` via Bash instead of MCP server.
QA agents use Grep/Read on the snapshot file instead of MCP tools.
Eliminates MCP server setup friction while keeping Tree-sitter
compression benefits.

- /pack: CLI invocation, stores filePath instead of outputId
- /qa + 5 audit skills: snapshot file path instead of MCP calls
- compact-prep.sh: references snapshot file
- Docs: mcp-setup.md rewritten as CLI guide, README updated

fix: classify OZON chat-not-started as permanent error

Pattern matching was broken: 'code 7' didn't match '"code":7',

patterns + 'access period has expired' and 'PermissionDenied'.
Stops 65 sequences from retrying every 30min forever.

parity: DECgraphics normalization, pline bypass fix, rnd_defensive_item, sp_lev branch placement

  bars ≠→#) in both screen and color comparisons; also fix color comparison to
  apply DEC symbol normalization per-cell after initial raw compare
- do_wear.js: use pline() instead of display.putstr_message for "already
  wearing" — fixes Norep tracking so "You are still in a pit." is not
  suppressed after intervening wear messages
- makemon.js: pass map to rnd_defensive_item so noteleport retry matches C
  (muse.c:1234 goto try_again)
- sp_lev.js: BR_NO_END1 branch placement must still call placeRegion to
  consume RNG, matching C behavior

  original recording (confirmed as tmux capture timing issue, not game logic)

Add NF system design for IER regenerant chemical recovery

Comprehensive engineering design document (ICH-NF-IER-DES-001) for
nanofiltration-based recovery of NaOH and HCl from ion exchange resin
regeneration waste. Covers membrane selection (Koch MPS-34, Mann+Hummel
NP030, Veolia Duracid), process flow, equipment sizing at 3 scales
(100/500/1000 m³/d), CAPEX/OPEX analysis, and sugar/sweetener industry
applications with real commercial case studies.

commit.message:
Fix CI: add OTP email verification and TESTMAIL_API_KEY env var

BaseTest.doLogin() now handles Salesforce email OTP by polling the
testmail.app API via Java HttpURLConnection when the post-login URL
doesn't contain /lightning/. Session is cached to session.json after
the first successful login so subsequent tests in the same run skip
re-login. ci.yml passes TESTMAIL_API_KEY secret to the mvn verify step.

commit.message:
Switch to AutoConfig/AutoModelForCausalLM; fix vocab size mismatch

Qwen3MoeForCausalLM is the wrong class for Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B: the
model uses qwen3_5_moe architecture (vocab 248320) not qwen3_moe (vocab
151936), causing a state_dict size mismatch on load.

Use AutoConfig + AutoModelForCausalLM so the correct class is resolved
from the model's own config.json. Keep the dict sub-config patch for
the GenerationConfig.from_model_config bug in transformers 4.52.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

demo: v2 story-first flow — deploy → registry → multisig → IDL-driven token governance (#16)

* feat: add logoscore --call e2e demo script

Validates the full Logos Core plugin stack headlessly:
logoscore CLI -> Qt plugin -> logos_host -> QtRemoteObjects ->
lez_multisig_module -> Rust FFI -> NSSA sequencer.

* demo: v2 — 9-step story-first flow with registry IDL fetch + run_cmd

* demo-v2: fix --members comma-separated + single --member-accounts-account

* demo-v2: one slot account per member for create-multisig

* demo-v2: member-accounts-account must be the actual member account IDs

* demo-v2: --member-accounts-account takes comma-separated list

* demo-v2: fix IDL CID whitespace stripping

* fix: mock-codex parse multipart/form-data uploads correctly

* demo-v2: use token-idl.json for registration and TX serialization

* fix: mock-codex remove cgi dependency, use pure regex multipart parsing

* demo-v2: use real Logos Storage node if available, fallback to mock

* demo-v2: detect real storage by TCP connect not HTTP status

* demo-v2: fix curl download path codex/v1 → storage/v1

* demo-v2: auto-start Logos Storage via Docker if available, fallback to mock

* chore: update Cargo.lock
